title: A-04 Win condition — single-fire completion signal

steps.title: Prompt (send verbatim to the agent)
steps.body:
Add the Hexa Sort completion logic per canonical-spec.md §5-§6.

Implement:
- SolvedFiredCount, starting at 0.
- After each successful Move, evaluate IsSolved. When a legal move first makes IsSolved true, increment SolvedFiredCount to 1 and emit a clear completion signal (a log line is sufficient). It must NOT fire on the seed, on a partial board, on an illegal move, or more than once.

Keep it deterministic and easy to verify in logs.

Write Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-04-win-condition.md with:
- The exact solved-state predicate (copy from §6).
- Where the completion signal is emitted.
- How duplicate firing is prevented (the guard).

Do not add animation, particles, audio, or UI.

steps.title: Expected outcomes (done_when — verify each with the named tool)
items: unity_open_mcp_compile_check (fallback: unity_open_mcp_read_compile_errors) reports zero compile errors
Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-04-win-condition.md exists and states the exact solved-state predicate copied from canonical-spec.md §6
The doc states where the completion signal is emitted and how duplicate firing is prevented (the guard)

steps.title: Paste the agent output / compile_check result

reset.note: The agent updates scripts under Assets/_Benchmark/HexaSort/ and writes A-04-win-condition.md, none of which the suite tracks in a manifest. To reset: delete Assets/_Benchmark/HexaSort/ and Assets/_Benchmark/Run/, then confirm editor idle (editor_status not compiling, not in play mode; read_compile_errors zero).
